scenario.incident_title: Payment API degraded — transaction failure rate >70%

design_properties.key_design_change: No policy section citations in any control-owner record. Evaluator must independently locate Sections 2.3, 3.4, 4.1, 4.4, 5.1, 6.2 and map facts to policy requirements without any pointer from the IC authorization or SecOps acknowledgement.

scary_flags: EMERGENCY AUTH CODE — PRIMARY AUTHENTICATOR BYPASSED
EMERGENCY OVERRIDE — STANDARD WORKFLOW NOT FOLLOWED
SRE LEVEL II — BELOW STANDARD THRESHOLD

harmless_findings.description: Post-session review scheduled without explicit timestamp in SecOps ack body. SOC-REVIEW-2026-0591 date appears in the Post-Access Review section, not in A. Patel's ack text. Information present but distributed.
Section 3.4 registry condition ('appears as active') requires one-step inference from A. Patel's 'issuance confirmed, no prior redemption recorded.' Evidence present, one inference required.
